result.stdout:
Description:
  A CLI tool to export diff files from two data.win.

Usage:
  ModShardDiff [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)  Name of the file to be compared to. []
  -r, --ref <ref> (REQUIRED)    Name of the reference to compare to.
  -o, --output <output>         Output folder for the diff files. []
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  A CLI tool to export diff files from two data.win.

Usage:
  ModShardDiff [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)  Name of the file to be compared to. []
  -r, --ref <ref> (REQUIRED)    Name of the reference to compare to.
  -o, --output <output>         Output folder for the diff files. []
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
